name: legalquants
description: Official LegalQuants Claude Code plugin. Read-only access to the LegalQuants community knowledge corpus for approved members.

plugins.name: lq
plugins.description: LegalQuants community access in Claude Code — one connector over the community's chat archive + curated knowledge vault, with /lq:start (personalized orientation), /lq:ask (cross-source answers), and /lq:assess. Members sign in with their LegalQuants account; guests get read access. v0.5.5.
